name: Bora Bora Burgers with Potato Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix 2 tablespoons of the teriyaki sauce and ginger thoroughly; add beef and mix until blended.
3. Form into 4 patties that are 1/2 inch thick.
4. Cook potato nuggets according to package directions, baking for 15 to 17 minutes until crispy.
5. In a small bowl, mix the remaining 1 1/2 tablespoons of teriyaki sauce, ketchup, and pepper flakes to make sauce; set aside.
6. Pan-fry burgers in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat to desired doneness, turning once.
7. On the bottoms of buns, layer burgers, pineapple slices, onion slices, and lettuce.
8. Cover with bun tops and serve with sauce on potato nuggets.
